title: Conflicting workspace deletion policies
initialPrompt: Define deletion behavior for a team workspace.
confirmedDecisions: Owners may delete a workspace immediately.
Workspace deletion requires a seven-day recovery window.

title: Correction to trial length
confirmedDecisions: The trial lasts fourteen days.
Correction: the trial lasts twenty-one days.

title: Deferred data retention decision
confirmedDecisions: Administrators can export audit logs.
Retention duration is deferred to the security owner.

title: Role permission provenance
confirmedDecisions: Editors may submit documents.
Only Approvers may approve a submitted document.

title: Stable billing item identity
initialPrompt: Add usage-based billing to an existing subscription.
confirmedDecisions: Usage is metered per API call.
Invoices are issued monthly.

title: Independent notification decisions
confirmedDecisions: Password-reset notifications use email.
Billing-failure notifications require a channel decision.

title: Dependent export decisions
confirmedDecisions: The export format must be selected before delivery-channel behavior.

title: Fresh asynchronous permit
confirmedDecisions: Invitations expire after seven days.
Reminder timing remains independent of role selection.

title: Stale asynchronous permit
confirmedDecisions: A correction removes the Manager approval stage.
A queued question about Manager escalation is now stale.

title: Ready specification calibration
confirmedDecisions: The link expires after one hour.
The link becomes invalid after the first successful download.
Failures expose no file metadata.

title: Blocked compliance launch
confirmedDecisions: Export format is CSV.
The required compliance approval is unresolved.

title: Payment retry edge cases
confirmedDecisions: Retry payment for seven days.
Keep billing controls usable while product access is read-only.

title: Concurrent seat updates
confirmedDecisions: Accepted invitations add a seat immediately.
Concurrent acceptance events must be idempotent.

title: Offline conflict behavior
confirmedDecisions: Edits queue locally while offline.
Conflicting server changes require explicit user resolution.

title: Measurable search latency
confirmedDecisions: Results should appear within two seconds at the p95 for ten thousand items.

title: Authorization acceptance criteria
confirmedDecisions: Owners and Billing Admins may download invoices.
Members have no invoice access.

title: Recovery state transitions
confirmedDecisions: A recovery token expires after thirty minutes.
Using a token invalidates every older token.

title: Public accessibility evidence
initialPrompt: Propose accessibility requirements for a public form.
confirmedDecisions: The first release targets keyboard operation.

evidence.title: Synthetic accessibility standard abstract
evidence.factualAbstract: Application-authored fixture: visible focus and labeled controls support keyboard evaluation.

title: Public security evidence
confirmedDecisions: Sessions expire after thirty minutes of inactivity.

evidence.title: Synthetic session-security abstract
evidence.factualAbstract: Application-authored fixture: session identifiers should be rotated after authentication changes.

title: Evidence cannot confirm a product choice
confirmedDecisions: The provider decision is still open.

evidence.title: Synthetic provider comparison abstract
evidence.factualAbstract: Application-authored fixture: provider capabilities vary by delivery region.

title: Cancellation late output
initialPrompt: Define cancellation of a long report.
confirmedDecisions: Cancellation stops local waiting immediately.
Late completion cannot replace the current revision.

title: Atomic batch failure
confirmedDecisions: Display names may contain spaces.
Avatar upload is optional.
If the batch fails neither decision is applied.

title: Stream interruption
confirmedDecisions: A broken lifecycle stream requires explicit retry.
Late output from the interrupted request is rejected.

title: Three-permit quality boundary
confirmedDecisions: Role selection, welcome-email tone, and optional avatar format are initially independent.
Dependency-invalidated summaries must be measured.
